article_meta.title: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S

transcript.content: You are an AI tool for journalists to identify bias in their articles. Output ONLY a valid JSON array. No prose, no markdown fences. Empty array [] if no bias found. Format: [{"biasType": "...", "biasedText": "...", "explanation": "..."}]

Bias types: Spin, Unsubstantiated Claims, Opinion Statements Presented as Fact, Sensationalism/Emotionalism, Mudslinging/Ad Hominem, Mind Reading, Slant, Flawed Logic, Bias by Omission, Omission of Source Attribution, Bias by Story Choice and Placement, Subjective Qualifying Adjectives, Word Choice, Negativity Bias, Elite vs. Populist Bias.

Be cautious — present fewer, confident examples rather than more uncertain ones.

Analyze this article:

---
HEADLINE: — News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S
SOURCE: Morning Wire

ARTICLE:

— News —'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S. Will 'Rescue' Iranians If Regime Opens Fire On ProtestersThe Islamic Republic has been rocked by demonstrations over its collapsing economy. By Leif Le Mahieu•Jan 2, 2026 DailyWire.com•FacebookXMailCredit: Photo by Jim WATSON / AFP via Getty Images. President Donald Trump said that the United States would come to the "rescue" if Iranian forces began shooting protesters, as demonstrations against the regime continued for a sixth consecutive day. Sparked by economic unrest, protests first broke out last weekend in Tehran with groups chanting "death to the dictator" and "freedom." Seven people, including protesters and government forces, have been killed so far, according to reports. "If Iran shots [sic] and violently kills peaceful protesters, which is their custom, the United States of America will come to their rescue," Trump posted on Truth Social early Friday morning. "We are locked and loaded and ready to go. Thank you for your attention to this matter!"Trump's warning comes as he has continued to take an aggressive approach to Iran, saying earlier this week that he would support more Israeli military strikes on the country if Tehran continues to develop ballistic missiles or pursue nuclear capabilities.In response to Trump's post, the secretary of Iran's Supreme National Security Council said any intervention by America would exacerbate instability in the area while accusing the United States and Israel of encouraging the disorder. "With the statements by Israeli officials and Donald Trump, what has been going on behind the scenes is now clear. We distinguish between the stance of the protesting shopkeepers and the actions of disruptive actors, and Trump should know that U.S. interference in this internal matter would mean destabilizing the entire region and destroying America's interests," he posted on X. "The American people should know — Trump started this adventurism. They should be mindful of their soldiers' safety."Christmas Sale – Get 40% off New DailyWire+ Annual MembershipsMuch of the violence has occurred in Western Iran, where a local official promised that protesters would be treated "decisively and without leniency," Reuters reported. Dozens of protesters, including women and children, have been arrested. On Thursday, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said the protests were the result of the government's failure to address skyrocketing inflation and widespread economic anxiety. "We are to blame… Do not look for America or anyone else to blame. We must serve properly so that people are satisfied with us…. It is us who have to find a solution to these problems," he said, Reuters reported. Iran's currency has reportedly dropped to 1.42 million to the dollar, a loss of more than 56% over six months, fueling soaring inflation and driving food prices up 72% from last year.Create a free account to join the conversation!Start CommentingAlready have an account?Log inGot a tip worth investigating?Your information could be the missing piece to an important story. Submit your tip today and make a difference.Submit TipThe Daily Wire > Read > 'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S. Will 'Rescue' Iranians If Regime Opens Fire On Protesters
---

parsed_output.biasedText: 'Locked And Loaded': Trump Warns U.S. Will 'Rescue' Iranians
parsed_output.explanation: The headline uses dramatic, militaristic language ('Locked And Loaded') designed to create emotional impact and attract attention, emphasizing confrontation over diplomatic nuance.

parsed_output.biasedText: Trump's warning comes as he has continued to take an aggressive approach to Iran, saying earlier this week that he would support more Israeli military strikes on the country if Tehran continues to develop ballistic missiles or pursue nuclear capabilities.
parsed_output.explanation: The article presents Trump's position without providing context about international law, congressional authorization for military action, or potential diplomatic alternatives. It also omits mention of other nations' or international organizations' responses to the Iranian protests.

parsed_output.biasedText: The article's overall framing focuses primarily on Trump's statement and Iran's response without substantial analysis of the complexities of intervention or the humanitarian situation
parsed_output.explanation: The story structure amplifies Trump's promise to 'rescue' protesters without critically examining the feasibility, legality, or historical context of such intervention, creating a slant that favors Trump's framing of the situation.
